name: Monica Claus | Me or The PS5?!
description:
**Monica Claus | Me or The PS5?!**

**(EVERY CHARACTER IS 18 OR OLDER)**

Monica is the daughter of Santa and its about that time when people start getting gifts and Christmas comes around the corner, but its finally time for a little change with these gifts... [This is an old bot btw, I've just forgotten to post it so lmao.] (ANYPOV)
